_comment: Example OpenClaw configuration for AI Community Platform integration
_note: This is a template - actual config is stored in .local/openclaw/state/openclaw.json

discovery._description: Discovery settings for automatic tool catalog updates

a2a._description: A2A bridge settings for invoking platform agents

tools._comment: Tools are automatically populated from discovery endpoint

gateway._description: Must match OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN in platform environment
